name: Cheesy Sausage Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the sausage into a large skillet and add the onion.
2. Cook over low heat until the sausage browns.
3. Drain well on paper towel.
4. Combine all ingredients in a bowl, stirring until dry ingredients are moistened well.
5. Drop batter by spoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto a lightly greased cookie sheet.
6. Bake at 425°F for 15 minutes or until lightly browned.
